column3: "Flaxseed lowers cholesterol" refers to its ability to decrease harmful cholesterol levels within a person's body, thus improving overall health.
"Flaxseed reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to ease bodily pain due to swelling or irritation.

"Flaxseed supports joint health" refers to its ability to provide nutrients that help maintain healthy cartilage and lubrication around bones, reducing inflammation and improving overall joint function.
"Flaxseed promotes healthy skin" refers to its ability to improve overall skin health due to its rich content of omega-3 fatty acids, vitamins, and antioxidants.

"Flaxseed improves digestion" refers to its ability to ease stomach discomfort and enhance the breakdown of food to
          promote better nutrient absorption during the digestive process.

"Flaxseed boosts immune system" refers to its ability to increase a person's immunity levels by providing essential nutrients and 
        protecting them from various illnesses.
"Flaxseed regulates blood sugar levels" refers to its ability to help control glucose levels in the body, thus maintaining healthy blood sugar balance.

"Flaxseed promotes heart health" refers to its ability to enhance cardiovascular functions and lower cholesterol levels, leading 
         to better heart condition overall.

"Flaxseed supports mental health" refers to its ability to provide essential nutrients and fatty acids that positively influence brain function, contributing to better mood and overall mental well-being.
"Flaxseed reduces cancer risk" refers to its ability to include high-quality nutrients that help prevent or slow down cancer cell growth.
